name: Latitude.sh
description: Latitude.sh — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Bare Metal Cloud.

seo.title: Latitude.sh Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Latitude.sh analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Latitude.sh is a Maps / Geolocation / Routing tool.
pros: Rich mapping and geocoding APIs with global coverage
cons: API call costs grow quickly with high map usage
review.best_for: Apps with location search, routing, or delivery features
review.not_for: Apps with no geographic or location requirements
